name: instantlog-skills
description: AI agent skill pack for InstantLog — covers logging integration, event taxonomy, MCP data access, and conversion analysis.

skills.name: instantlog_logging_integration
skills.description: How to instrument any app with InstantLog logging (setup, API, log levels, metadata, platform examples)

skills.name: instantlog_event_taxonomy
skills.description: Standard event naming conventions and metadata keys for consistent, analytics-ready logging

skills.name: instantlog_mcp_data_access
skills.description: How to connect to the InstantLog MCP server and use its tools to query logs and run analytics

skills.name: instantlog_conversion_playbook
skills.description: Step-by-step agent playbook: analyze funnels, investigate errors, fix code, verify improvements
